requirements.summary: Add a dismissible 'Happy Holi' greeting banner or overlay that appears only on March 14, 2025, displaying 'Happy Holi 🎨' in bold gold typography on a black background
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Happy Holi 🎨' greeting is visible at the top of the page or as an overlay when first landing on the site on March 14, 2025
The greeting uses gold text on a black background
The banner/overlay is not shown on any other date
The greeting is dismissible or auto-fades after a few seconds

file_operations.description: Create a dismissible overlay/banner component displaying 'Happy Holi 🎨' in gold text on a black background. The component should auto-dismiss after 5 seconds or allow manual dismissal via a close button. Use animations for entrance and exit. Store dismissal state in sessionStorage to prevent re-showing during the same session. Use the date-gating utility to conditionally render.

Import and render the HoliGreeting component at the very top of the component tree (before WelcomePopup) so it appears first. Wire it to use the date-gating utility to ensure it only renders on March 14, 2025.

requirements.summary: Apply Holi-themed color accent layer with scattered semi-transparent splashes of vibrant colors (pink, red, green, cyan, orange, yellow) as decorative background elements for March 14, 2025 only
acceptanceCriteria: Colorful Holi-themed decorative elements (pink, red, green, cyan, orange, yellow) are visible on the page on March 14, 2025
The existing black and gold design tokens are preserved and remain dominant
Holi color accents do not appear on any date other than March 14, 2025
Decorative splashes/blobs are semi-transparent and do not obscure primary content or CTAs

file_operations.description: Create a fixed-position decorative overlay component that renders semi-transparent Holi color splashes/blobs (pink, red, green, cyan, orange, yellow) scattered across the viewport. Use the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/holi-splash.dim_800x400.png as a repeating or positioned decorative element. Set low opacity (0.15-0.25) and use pointer-events: none to ensure clicks pass through. Position splashes behind main content (z-index below navigation and content). Use the date-gating utility to conditionally render.

Import and render the HoliColorAccents component as a fixed background layer (after HoliGreeting, before main content sections). Ensure it's wrapped in the date-gating check so it only appears on March 14, 2025.

requirements.summary: Implement a date-gating utility function that returns true only when the current date is March 14, 2025, to control all Holi-themed component rendering
acceptanceCriteria: A utility function or constant checks if today is March 14, 2025
All Holi-themed UI elements (banner, color splashes) are wrapped in a conditional that uses this check
On any date other than March 14, 2025, the website renders exactly as before with no Holi elements visible

file_operations.description: Create a utility module exporting an isHoliToday() function that checks if the current local date is March 14, 2025. Return true only on that exact date, false otherwise. Use the Date API to get the current date and compare year, month (2 for March), and day (14).
